allow: Bash(nvim --headless -c "redir @a | hi TabLine | redir END | put a | w! /tmp/hl_test.txt | qa")
Bash(nvim --headless -c "redir @a | hi WinBar | hi WinBarNC | hi StatusLine | hi Pmenu | hi FloatTitle | hi TabLineSel | redir END | put a | w! /tmp/hl_test.txt | qa")
Bash(nvim --headless -c "redir @a | hi StatusLineNC | hi CursorLine | hi NormalFloat | hi Comment | hi MiniDiffSignAdd | hi MiniDiffSignDelete | redir END | put a | w! /tmp/hl_test.txt | qa")
